svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD BS[BeaconService
Fable service wrapper] CM[CapabilityManager
Host app capabilities] CA[CapabilityAdapter
Descriptor -> Provider bridge] CS[ConnectivityHTTP
Transport config] BC[BeaconClient
Thin client] EX[Executor
Work item router] PR[ProviderRegistry
Provider index] CP[CapabilityProvider
Base class] SP[Shell Provider] FP[FileSystem Provider] LP[LLM Provider] UP[Custom Provider] BS --> CM BS --> CS BS --> BC CM -->|buildProviderDescriptors| CA CA -->|registerProvider| PR BC --> EX EX --> PR PR --> SP PR --> FP PR --> LP PR --> UP CP -.->|extends| SP CP -.->|extends| FP CP -.->|extends| LP CP -.->|extends| UP CP -.->|extends| CA ","style":"notebook"}
